description: Create an OAPP on STARNET and publish it so other developers can discover, install, and fork it. Demonstrates the STARNET distribution layer: the moment building locally becomes networked.
notes: This recipe uses mcp_invoke (STAR WebAPI). For the STAR CLI scripted variant, see oapp-create.json.
An OAPP on STARNET carries: version history, Avatar attribution, download count, karma-weighted trust signal, and install command.
Use this after you have built the content (NPCs, quests, items) — publish the package, not just code.

steps.description: Register the OAPP as a STARNET holon linked to the logged-in Avatar.

parameters.{oappDescription}: Human-readable pitch: what this OAPP contains and what problem it solves (string)

notes: Requires STAR WebAPI running and Avatar beam-in.
Returns { success: true, data: { id, name, version, ... } }.
Save the returned id as oappId for step 2.
The OAPP is created but not yet publicly listed — that happens in step 2.

example.name: MarketDistrict-NPCs
example.description: A pack of 3 FiveM RP server NPCs with STAR holons and ElevenLabs voice agents: Martinez (corrupt detective), Elena (bar owner), Dario (street fixer). Drop-in ready.

steps.description: Publish the OAPP to STARNET — it becomes publicly discoverable and installable.

parameters.{oappIdFromStep1}: id returned by star_create_oapp in step 1

notes: Returns { success: true, data: { id, starnetUrl, installCommand, ... } }.
After this call, any developer can run: star oapp install {oappName}
Save the starnetUrl and installCommand to the project README.
To update later: star_republish_oapp with the same id and bumped version.
To remove from public listing: star_unpublish_oapp.

steps.description: Update or create README.md with the STARNET install command and OAPP metadata.
notes: Append (or write) a section: ## Install via STARNET, the install command, and the starnetUrl.
This makes the repo self-documenting for anyone who discovers it on STARNET or GitHub.
steps.output_section_example:
## Install via STARNET

```
star oapp install MarketDistrict-NPCs
```

STARNET: {starnetUrl}

Published by Avatar: {avatarUsername} | Version: 1.0.0

cli_alternative.description: CLI scripted variant for create step only (no publish flag in CLI create).

agent_prompt_summary: Use star_create_oapp with name, description, version, and tags. Then star_publish_oapp with the returned id. Append the STARNET install command to README.md.
